source.title: The Ancient Faith Prayer Book
source.sourceUse: source-critical inventory only; no prayer text imported in this tranche

scope: Eastern Orthodox Book of Needs / devotional-prayer source selection. This inventory identifies candidate prayers from the Ancient Faith Prayer Book structure while rejecting blanket ingestion of the book.
governingDecisions: Do not ingest all prayers from this source.
Do not use prayers that appear to be fully unique to this compilation as first-pass Universal Office Book of Needs entries.
Prefer ancient, biblical, liturgical, or commonly received Orthodox prayers with independent witness value.
Use this source as a locator or comparison witness when the prayer is widely received elsewhere.
Do not change runtime UI or tradition counts in this tranche.
notFirstPass: modern/pastoral need-prayers from Prayers for Various Needs and Occasions unless independently attested
marriage/fertility/pregnancy/miscarriage prayers unless independently attested and pastorally reviewed
publisher-unique compiled devotional prayers without independent Orthodox reception

candidates.title: The Trisagion Prayers
candidates.sourceSection: Morning Prayers; Afternoon Prayers; Late Evening Prayers; Thanksgiving After Holy Communion
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Use an independent received Orthodox prayer-book or liturgical source witness before adding runtime text.
candidates.reason: The Trisagion prayers are broadly received in Orthodox daily prayer and already function as common Orthodox prayer structure.

candidates.title: The Jesus Prayer
candidates.sourceSection: Prayers for Various Needs and Occasions / Spiritual Life
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Use independently received wording rather than treating this compilation as the controlling source.
candidates.reason: The Jesus Prayer is a central and widely received Orthodox devotional prayer, not unique to this source.

candidates.title: The Prayer of Manasseh
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Prefer the app's Bible/source corpus or another public-domain scripture witness for runtime text.
candidates.reason: This is a scriptural penitential prayer and a strong repentance candidate, but the runtime text should come from a scripture source witness rather than the compilation.

candidates.title: Psalm 50
candidates.sourceSection: Morning Prayers; Late Evening Prayers; Prayers for Confession
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Use the app's psalter/scripture corpus rather than the compilation text.
candidates.reason: Psalm 50 is the standard Orthodox penitential psalm and belongs naturally in repentance contexts.

candidates.title: Prayer of St. Mardarios
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Compare against Horologion/Orthodox prayer-book witnesses before importing.
candidates.reason: A common Orthodox evening prayer with ancient attribution; suitable candidate after source comparison.

candidates.title: Prayer of St. Philaret of Moscow
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Use only after independent Orthodox source witness review.
candidates.reason: Widely used in Orthodox morning prayer, but modern rather than ancient; not the first ancient/common batch.

candidates.title: Prayers Before Holy Communion
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Treat as communion-preparation material, not ordinary Book of Needs default content.
candidates.reason: Common and important Orthodox devotional material, but belongs in a communion-preparation lane rather than the first Book of Needs needs-prayer batch.

candidates.title: Thanksgiving After Holy Communion
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Treat as communion-thanksgiving material, not ordinary Book of Needs default content.
candidates.reason: Common Orthodox prayer material, but feature placement should be communion-specific.

candidates.title: Before Reading the Scriptures or Other Spiritual Texts
candidates.sourceSection: Prayers for Various Needs and Occasions / Spiritual Life
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Use only if matched to a common Orthodox prayer outside this compilation.
candidates.reason: Useful category, but this source alone should not control runtime prayer text.

candidates.title: Before a Journey
candidates.sourceSection: Prayers for Various Needs and Occasions / Work, Study, and Recreation
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Prefer Big Book of Needs or another Orthodox service/prayer-book source for journey prayers.
candidates.reason: The need category is appropriate, but the text should be corroborated outside this modern compilation.

candidates.title: Prayer of a Sick Person
candidates.sourceSection: Prayers for Various Needs and Occasions / Sickness and Health
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Prefer Big Book of Needs or independently received Orthodox sources for sickness prayers.
candidates.reason: The need category is central to Book of Needs, but this compilation should not be the sole source for runtime wording.

candidates.title: Prayer for a Sick Person
candidates.sourceSection: Prayers for Various Needs and Occasions / Sickness and Health
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Prefer Big Book of Needs or independently received Orthodox sources for sickness prayers.
candidates.reason: Potentially useful lay-devotional content, but requires independent source comparison.

candidates.title: Before Using the Internet
candidates.sourceSection: Prayers for Various Needs and Occasions / Work, Study, and Recreation
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Do not use as an EO source-prayer candidate in the first pass.
candidates.reason: Contemporary-context prayer is useful pastorally but not the ancient/common Orthodox material sought for this tranche.

candidates.title: Marriage, family, pregnancy, miscarriage, and infant-death prayers
candidates.sourceSection: Prayers for Various Needs and Occasions / Marriage and Family
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Handle through dedicated pastoral review and comparison with Big Book of Needs/source witnesses.
candidates.reason: Pastorally important but sensitive; not appropriate for casual bulk ingestion from a modern compilation.

candidates.title: Prayers of the Saints
candidates.preferredSourcePath: Use individual saint/source witnesses rather than this anthology as controlling source.
candidates.reason: The section mixes ancient, Western, Orthodox, and modern saint material; selection must be source-specific.
